content.text:
Welcome to Minecraft!

Minecraft is a sandbox video game where players can build, explore, and survive in a blocky, procedurally-generated 3D world.

What You'll Learn:

  • Basic game controls and movement
  • Understanding the Minecraft world
  • Day and night cycle
  • Basic survival skills

Getting Started:

When you first spawn in Minecraft, you'll appear in a random location in the world. Your first task is to gather basic resources and find shelter before nightfall.

Key Controls:

  • WASD - Move
  • Space - Jump
  • Left Click - Break blocks
  • Right Click - Place blocks
  • E - Open inventory
